description.ko: 성운 가스를 어두운 소용돌이 속으로 끌어당기는 장엄한 중력 특이점.
description.en: A majestic gravitational singularity pulling nebula gases into a dark vortex.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Celestial Anchor.' A massive vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter pulling gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils into a gravitational singularity. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through thick cosmic dust. Atmosphere of infinite scale, lens-warping effects, divine majesty, volumetric lighting, hyper-realistic space photography.
